data.user_prompt: Who are the best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity Who are the best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY?

sections.text:
The best mental health counseling providers in Louisville, KY include **Grace Psychological Services**, **Northstar Counseling Center**, **Best Life Mental Health Services**, **Kentucky Counseling Center**, and **Bridge Counseling & Wellness**, with many residents also recommending **Norton Behavioral Medicine** for telehealth options.

### Top Local Providers by Specialty and Accessibility

| Provider | Key Strengths | Location/Notes |
|----------|---------------|----------------|
| **Grace Psychological Services** [1] | Comprehensive care for adults, children, teens, couples; specializes in anxiety, trauma, relationships, ADHD, autism, learning disabilities | Louisville, KY |
| **Northstar Counseling Center** [2] | Individual, couple, child, and family counseling; offers morning, afternoon, evening sessions; open 6 days/week | St. Matthews (Sears Avenue) |
| **Best Life Mental Health Services** [3] | Open and affirming practice; therapy for individuals, couples, families, children, adolescents; focuses on authentic living | Louisville, KY; Call (502) 333-9466 |
| **Kentucky Counseling Center** [5] | Largest counseling center in Kentucky; offers in-person, telehealth, psychiatry, case management; multiple locations | Louisville Highlands (1169 Eastern Pkwy #3328) |
| **Bridge Counseling & Wellness** [6][7] | Traditional talk therapy + alternative approaches (art, etc.); Spanish-speaking clinicians available; grant funding possible | Baxter Ave; Reddit users report strong PTSD/depression support |
| **Norton Behavioral Medicine** [9] | Telehealth psychiatrists, therapists, psychologists, addiction specialists; serves Kentucky & Indiana | Telehealth-only |

### Community-Recommended Options
- **Mandala House** (Baxter Ave) – Mentioned by Reddit users as a strong option [7]
- **Awen Health and Wellness** (Lyndon Lane, near Oxmoor Kia) – Counselor accepting new clients [7]
- **Acadia Counseling** (St. Matthews) – Another local recommendation [7]
- **The Mindfulness Center**, **Peaceful Solutions Counseling**, **Innovative Family Therapy** – Top-rated on Yelp [10]

### Specialized Care Providers
- **Eric Russ, PhD** (Psychology Today) [4] – Expert in trauma, depression, anxiety, PTSD, personality disorders
- **Stephanie Pound, LPCC-S** [4] – Nonjudgmental, supportive space for meaningful change
- **Louisville Behavioral Health Systems** [8] – Psychiatrists, nurse practitioners, therapists; uses NeuroStar treatment

For the most current availability and to verify provider credentials, consider checking **Psychology Today** [4], **Yelp** [10], or contacting providers directly. Many offer telehealth, evening sessions, and sliding-scale fees.
